word: G3779 - οὕτω - hoútō - hoo'-to - After that

sections.paragraph:
- Original: οὕτω

- Transliteration: Houto

- Phonetic: hoo'-to

- Definition:

1. in this manner, thus, so

- Origin: from G3778

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: Or before a vowel οὕτως houtō s hoo'-toce. From G3778; in this way (referring to what precedes or follows): - after that after (in) this manner as even (so) for all that like (-wise) no more on this fashion (-wise) so (in like manner) thus what.
